name: Sauce Ole'
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients (starting with 3 tablespoons lime juice) in a saucepan.
2. Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat.
3. Cook for approximately 10 minutes, allowing the sauce to slightly thicken while the vegetables soften but remain crisp-tender.
4. Taste and add additional lime juice if desired.
5. Refrigerate the sauce for at least 1 hour to allow the flavors to develop.
6. Serve the sauce chilled. It can be refrigerated for several days.
